Datatable column details: {"dt_bi": ["No", "Jenis Carian", "Status", "Action"], "dt_bm": ["No", "Jenis Carian", "Status", "Tindakan"], "dt_js": ["return row.index ", "", "", "return `\r\n\r\n`"], "dt_key": ["", "sbss_type", "sbss_status", ""], "dt_ajax": "api/MM_API_GLOBAL_SETUPCARIANSBG?dt_listing=1", "dt_post": null, "dt_sort": ["unsortable", "default", "default", "unsortable"], "dt_bInfo": "true", "dt_class": ["small-column", "", "", "action-column"], "dt_print": "false", "dt_filter": "default", "dt_bPaginate": "true", "dt_pageLength": "5", "dt_aLengthMenu": "5,10,25,50,100", "dt_freeze_left": "0", "dt_freeze_right": "0", "dt_bLengthChange": "false"}
Business Logic (BL) Details:
<?php

include('userinfo.php');

if($_GET['dt_listing']){

	$param = [];

	if($_POST['search']['value']){
		$filter = "
			AND CONCAT_WS('__',
				sbss_type,
				sbss_status
			) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
		";
		$param[] = $_POST['search']['value'];
	}

	$common = "
		FROM
			".DB2.".setup_budget_structure_search
		WHERE
			1 = 1
			$filter
    ";
    

    //============================================================ record count
	$sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) C $common";
	$recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sql, $param)[0];

    //============================================================ main sql
    $sql = "
        SELECT
			sbss_id,
			sbss_type,
			sbss_status
        $common
        ORDER BY {$_POST['orderBy'][0]} {$_POST['orderBy'][1]}
        LIMIT {$_POST['start']}, {$_POST['length']}
    ";
    $data = executeQueryV2($sql, $param);

    // for($i=0; $i<count($data); $i++){
    //     $data[$i]['urlEdit'] = 'index.php?a='.flc_url_encode('page=page_wrapper&menuID=1855&pyb_pybatch_id='.$data[$i]['pyb_pybatch_id']);
    // }

    //============================================================ finally
    return [
        'draw' => $_POST['draw'],
        'recordsFiltered' => $recordsFiltered['C'],
        'data' => $data
    ];
}

if($_GET['billSetup']){

	$param = [];

	if($_POST['search']['value']){
		$filter = "
			AND CONCAT_WS('__',
				bis_type,
				bis_status
			) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
		";
		$param[] = $_POST['search']['value'];
	}

	$common = "
		FROM
			".DB2.".bills_setup
		WHERE
			1 = 1
			$filter
    ";
    

    //============================================================ record count
	$sql = "SELECT COUNT(*) C $common";
	$recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sql, $param)[0];

    //============================================================ main sql
    $sql = "
        SELECT
			bis_id,
			bis_type,
			bis_status
        $common
        ORDER BY {$_POST['orderBy'][0]} {$_POST['orderBy'][1]}
        LIMIT {$_POST['start']}, {$_POST['length']}
    ";
    $data = executeQueryV2($sql, $param);

    // for($i=0; $i<count($data); $i++){
    //     $data[$i]['urlEdit'] = 'index.php?a='.flc_url_encode('page=page_wrapper&menuID=1855&pyb_pybatch_id='.$data[$i]['pyb_pybatch_id']);
    // }

    //============================================================ finally
    return [
        'draw' => $_POST['draw'],
        'recordsFiltered' => $recordsFiltered['C'],
        'data' => $data
    ];
}

if($_GET['getDataModal']){
	$data = executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "
			SELECT 
				sbss_id,
				sbss_type,
				sbss_status
			FROM
				".DB2.".setup_budget_structure_search
			WHERE
				sbss_id = ?
		",
		"params" => [$_POST['sbss_id']]
	])[0];

	return[
		"dataModal" => $data
	];
}

if($_GET['getDataBillSetup']){
	$data = executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "
			SELECT 
				bis_id,
				bis_type,
				bis_status
			FROM
				".DB2.".bills_setup
			WHERE
				bis_id = ?
		",
		"params" => [$_POST['bis_id']]
	])[0];

	return[
		"dataModal" => $data
	];
}

if($_GET['saveModal']){

	executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "UPDATE ".DB2.".setup_budget_structure_search SET sbss_status = 'INACTIVE'"
	]);

	$_POST['dataModal']['sbss_id'] = $_POST['sbss_id'];

	expressDML([
		"table" => "setup_budget_structure_search",
		"data" => $_POST['dataModal']
	]);

	return[
		"status" => "ok"
	];
}

if($_GET['saveBillSetupModal']){

	$_POST['dataModal']['bis_id'] = $_POST['bis_id'];

	expressDML([
		"table" => "bills_setup",
		"data" => $_POST['dataModal']
	]);

	return[
		"status" => "ok"
	];
}

if($_GET['getDataSemiStrict']){
	$data = executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "
			SELECT 
				sbss_column_selection,
				sbss_level_selection
			FROM
				".DB2.".setup_budget_structure_search
			WHERE
				sbss_type = 'SEMISTRICT'
		"
	])[0];

	return[
		"semiStrict" => $data
	];
}

if($_GET['getAllDataForm']){
	$data = executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "
			SELECT 
				sbss_column_selection,
				sbss_level_selection
			FROM
				".DB2.".setup_budget_structure_search
			WHERE
				sbss_type = 'SEMISTRICT'
		"
	])[0];

	$data2 = executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "SELECT bis_sequence_level FROM ".DB2.".bills_setup WHERE bis_type = 'CustomWF'"
	])[0];

	$allData = $data + $data2;

	return[
		"allData" => $allData
	];
}

if($_GET['saveSemiStrict']){

	executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "UPDATE ".DB2.".setup_budget_structure_search SET sbss_column_selection = ?, sbss_level_selection = ? WHERE sbss_type = 'SEMISTRICT'",
		"params" => [$_POST['dataSemiStrict']['sbss_column_selection'], $_POST['dataSemiStrict']['sbss_level_selection']]
	]);

	return[
		"status" => "ok"
	];
}

if($_GET['saveBillSetupCustomWF']){

	executeQueryV2([
		"sql" => "UPDATE ".DB2.".bills_setup SET bis_sequence_level = ? WHERE bis_type = 'CustomWF'",
		"params" => [$_POST['dataBillSetupCustomWF']['bis_sequence_level']]
	]);

	return[
		"status" => "ok"
	];
}

Form_Item_lookup_query: SELECT wfp_sequence flc_id, CONCAT_WS(' - ', wfp_sequence, wfp_process_name) flc_name FROM fims_usr.wf_process wp WHERE wfp_workflow_code = 'BILLREG_AP' ORDER BY wfp_sequence
